_comment: Curated fallback for `2b setup` when live discovery from ollama.com is unavailable (offline / site changed). The live list is fetched by discover.py; this ships in the wheel as the offline fallback.

models.name: qwen3:4b
models.note: small & fast — good for low-RAM machines

models.name: gemma4:12b-mlx
models.note: opt-in — some machines show a cold-reload slowdown

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:14b
models.note: coder-focused — can slow on very large files
